name: MHA — VILLAIN REHAB — U.A
description:
Alright, so! This one is my first bot, duh. It was kind of tricky to manage cuz of how difficult it was to stop the character from speaking for the user. I think it worked tho. I mean, in my chats, this shit does not speak for me, so that’s good at least. But in case it does, just edit that part out or smth. It should work normally then for some time.

You’re a Villain at U.A— blah, blah, blah! I think you know exactly what this is about. It’s not like this is my original concept or anythin.

So just enjoy, or at least try to.

(By the way, this bot is inspired by another bot made by a creator by the name of Luna1256, so make sure to check that one out too!)
creator: GookuBlaackK
